positive: A highly stylized and symmetrical composition featuring bioluminescent mythical flora and celestial elements. The main subject is a central arrangement of ornate, deep sapphire and emerald geometric flowers, intertwined with glowing, stylized vines and crescent moons. The design should utilize clean silhouettes, strong black line work reminiscent of Neo-tattoo or Ukiyo-e woodblock prints, paired with a vibrant, high-contrast color palette (electric blue, deep teal, emerald green, and gold accents). The composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, designed as a repeating pattern or single, impactful chest print. Style: Detailed vector illustration, Art Deco symmetry, maximalist but organized. Lighting: Dramatic, focused spotlighting creating deep shadows and ethereal glows. Suitable for screen printing on dark fabric.
negative: text, letters, words, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, trademark, low resolution, blur, artifact, cropped, out of focus, dirty background, noisy, grayscale, bad anatomy, extra limbs, abstract noise
